scene.description: A 3D scene definition for a room. All units are in millimeters. The origin (0,0,0) is the front-left-bottom corner. X-axis is width, Y-axis is depth, Z-axis is height.

view_point.style: cozy, modern, bright, photorealistic, wide-angle lens

objects.name: main_window
objects.details: A window on the right wall (at x=4000), starting 1000mm from the floor. Covered with sheer white curtains, lets in soft daylight.

objects.name: double_bed
objects.material: dark wood frame with grey linen bedding, placed against the back wall.

objects.name: wardrobe
objects.material: white matte finish, placed against the left wall.

objects.name: desk
objects.material: light oak wood with black metal legs, placed against the right wall under the window.
